suites.evidence: Ran 5 tests / 8 expectations; three reproducible WS4 contract failures.

adversarialCases.evidence: 5,000 CJK/emoji lines page forward; SHA-256 matches node crypto; rendered ANSI-stripped lines fit width 20.
Hash8 equals the first eight hex characters of SHA-256; single-line L<n>, range L<start>-L<end>, comment order, and freeform-note ordering match the serialized contract.
L2-L99 against a two-line plan emits five invented blank quote lines after > two.
CRLF CJK source lines retain raw carriage returns in markdown quote payloads, yielding embedded CR bytes.
At width 20, the one-line action bar is truncated after the first action; the other three actions are not exposed in rendered output.

interactive-mode.ts only reopens with a warning when review.comments.length is nonzero. A stale snapshot carrying freeform notes but no line comments proceeds without reconfirmation, contrary to stale mismatch at any decision.

Existing focused tests pass for ordinary refine prompt dispatch and approval/compaction lifecycle paths; source confirms refine calls session.prompt(revisionPrompt) without synthetic options and approved paths render reviewer comments into the synthetic prompt.

blockers.title: Out-of-range review ranges fabricate quoted blank lines
blockers.repro: Run bun --cwd packages/coding-agent test test/g005-ws4-redteam.test.ts. The 'clips an out-of-bounds line range' case fails: serializePlanReviewComments('one\ntwo', hash, [L2-L99]) emits > two plus five > blank lines.
blockers.expected: Quote only existing referenced plan lines (and define how an entirely invalid range is handled).
blockers.actual: The loop caps at startLine + 5 but never at lines.length, using an empty fallback for missing lines.

blockers.title: CRLF plan comments are not normalized for markdown serialization
blockers.repro: Run the same red-team suite. With 第一行\r\n第二行\r\n第三行 and L1-L2, output contains carriage returns after each quoted source line.
blockers.expected: Quoted display lines serialize with newline delimiters only while the snapshot hash remains the hash of the original file bytes.
blockers.actual: content.split('\n') leaves terminal \r in each CRLF source line and serialization embeds it.

blockers.title: Empty/missing plan state hides three required actions at width 20
blockers.repro: Run the same red-team suite. PlanPreviewOverlay(null).render(20) truncates the one-line action bar to 'Approve and exec…'.
blockers.expected: The explicit empty state exposes all four actions at minimum supported width.
blockers.actual: All actions are joined into a single line before truncation, so compact/keep/refine are invisible.

blockers.title: Stale review with freeform notes but no line comments is not reconfirmed
blockers.repro: Open a plan review, enter notes without a line comment, modify plan.md before selecting a decision. In handlePlanApproval, staleComments is true but the warning/reopen branch is skipped because review.comments.length is zero.
blockers.expected: Any stale snapshot invalidates review guidance and reopens confirmation, including notes-only review.
blockers.actual: The stale guard only handles nonempty line-comment arrays; notes continue into the decision against changed content.
